apple.summary: Hardware used for PCC is subject to rigorous security processes.

apple.summary: Custom-built server hardware ensures security properties are immutable.

apple.summary: PCC nodes support privacy-aware management, observation, and debug capabilities.

apple.title: Non-Targetability
apple.summary: PCC is designed to ensure that an attacker cannot target specific PCC users.

apple.title: No Privileged Runtime Access
apple.summary: PCC is designed without privileged interfaces that might expose user data.

apple.title: PCC Agent
apple.summary: PCC Agent executes application-specific workflows on proxy nodes, coordinating tool invocations across PCC nodes.

apple.title: Private Information Retrieval
apple.summary: A cryptographic technique for retrieving data from servers outside the PCC trust boundary without revealing which records were accessed.

apple.summary: PCC attestation capabilities support independently verifiable transparency.

apple.title: Request Flow
apple.summary: Anonymous request routing is designed to ensure non-targetability.

apple.title: Attested Request Handling
apple.summary: We designed the PCC application protocol to preserve client anonymity and efficiently route traffic through the PCC fleet.

apple.title: Runtime Configuration and Assets
apple.summary: PCC supports runtime-configurable properties and cloud-distributed assets to manage node behavior during boot sessions.

apple.title: Software Foundations
apple.summary: PCC nodes run a purpose-built operating system designed for protecting user data.

apple.title: Software Layering
apple.summary: The PCC node software is designed to ensure transparency of all components.

apple.title: Source Code
apple.summary: To simplify security research, source code is available for certain security-critical PCC components.

apple.title: Stateless Computation and Enforceable Guarantees
apple.summary: The PCC node is designed to safeguard user data and enforce it is not retained once request processing is complete.

apple.title: Stateless Inference
apple.summary: The PCC inference engine enables high performance while keeping user data private.

apple.title: Transitive Trust
apple.summary: PCC nodes establish transitive trust in other nodes by validating attestations on behalf of a user’s device.

apple.title: Verifiable Transparency
apple.summary: Security researchers can verify the PCC privacy and security guarantees.

apple.summary: Interact with and debug the PCC software stack.

apple.summary: Privacy-preserving lookup of visual entities using embedding-based search and private information retrieval (PIR).
